title: Real Estate Division
description:
Real EstateReal Estate DivisionAs a developer in the Real Estate industry, Highland Estates Limited has built 7 large-scale warehouses at Kingolwira. Each warehouse has an area of 6000sq Metres. Out of the 7 warehouses constructed, 6 of them have been leased out to M/s Alliance One Tobacco Limited.View Real Estate DivisionAgricultureAgricultural DivisionWe own and run Mbarali Rice Farm, having a total area of 8,000 Acres located in the southern part of Tanzania, in Mbarali Town, Mbeya Region.View Agricultural DivisionTradingTrading DivisionHighland Estates Limited has over 8,000 Acres of Paddy Farms in Mbarali.

Due to the nature of our farm work, our Company has to buy Tons of Fertilizers from Local/ International Suppliers every year.View Trading servicesTransportationCargo & TransportationWe transport to all local towns and wider to East Africa region i.e. Kenya, Uganda, Rwanda and Zambia. View Cargo servicesIntegrityActing with honesty and strong moral principles.
TeamworkPromoting collaboration and mutual support.
ExcellenceStriving for the highest quality in actions, work, or service.
AccountabilityTaking responsibility for actions and decisions.
Our core valuesThe fundamental beliefs, principles, and guiding philosophies that shape our organization. They serve as a compass, providing direction and purpose to our daily operations. Integrity, teamwork, Excellence at work and Accountability.VISIONTo cultivate sustainable growth and prosperity across communities by leveraging our legacy of excellence in agriculture, transportation and construction whilst expanding into trading and manufacturing by pioneering innovative solutions for a thriving future.
MISSIONDrawing from our roots in agriculture and transportation, we commit to delivering quality service, nurturing partnerships and embracing technological advancements to enrich lives and develop communities.
